Package algorithms

package algorithms
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Bfs
    Utility class for performing Breadth-First Search (BFS) and connectivity checks on graphs.
    Dijkstra
    Implementation of Dijkstra's algorithm for shortest path calculations in weighted graphs.
    Kruskal
    Implements Kruskal's algorithm to compute the Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) of a graph.
    SD2
     
    SmartDijkstra
    Implements a modified Dijkstra algorithm optimized for student pathfinding with constraints such as budget, edge capacity, and multi-objective optimization (cost, time, distance).
    SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights
    Encapsulates weighting parameters for cost, time, and distance.
    SmartDijkstra.PathResult
    Encapsulates the result of a pathfinding operation.
    TSP
     
    TSP.TSPResult
     
    UnionFind
    Disjoint Set Union (Union-Find) data structure with path compression and union by rank.
